RUNESMITH2-BREAK.description: Destroy a Rune and use its Break effect.
RUNESMITH2-BREAK.title: Break
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-NONE.description:
Current Charge: [blue]{Charge:diff()}[/blue]
Charge will not be depleted.
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-NONE.title: Charge
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-END.description:
Current Charge: [blue]{Charge:diff()}[/blue]
At the end of turn, [blue]1[/blue] Charge will be depleted to trigger the [gold]Passive[/gold] ability.
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-END.title: Charge
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-START.description:
Current Charge: [blue]{Charge:diff()}[/blue]
At the start of turn, [blue]1[/blue] Charge will be depleted to trigger the [gold]Passive[/gold] ability.
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE-TURN-START.title: Charge
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE.description: Runes deplete [blue]1[/blue] Charge to activate their passive abilities.
RUNESMITH2-CHARGE.title: Charge
RUNESMITH2-CRAFT.description:
Create a Rune using {elements:rs2Icon(all)}.
You can have no more than [blue]7[/blue] active Runes.
RUNESMITH2-CRAFT.title: Craft
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS.description: Elements ([gold]Ignis[/gold] {elements:rs2Icon(ignis)}, [gold]Terra[/gold] {elements:rs2Icon(terra)}, and [gold]Aqua[/gold] {elements:rs2Icon(aqua)}) are used to play [gold]Recipe[/gold] cards or improve certain card effects.
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS.title: Elements
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS_COUNT.description:
Your current Elements count, consisting of [gold]Ignis[/gold] ({elements:rs2Icon(ignis)}), [gold]Terra[/gold] ({elements:rs2Icon(terra)}), and [gold]Aqua[/gold] ({elements:rs2Icon(aqua)}).
Elements are used to play certain cards or improve card effects.
[color=gray][font_size=16]Click on this to make it translucent.[/font_size][/color]
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTS_COUNT.title: Elements
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCE.description: Increase damage, [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Potency[/gold] of a card by [blue]50%[/blue]. Can be stacked additively. [gold]Enhance[/gold] is removed after the card is played.
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCE.title: Enhance
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCED.description: Card damage, [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Potency[/gold] are increased by [blue]{Amount:diff()}%[/blue]. [gold]Enhance[/gold] is removed after the card is played.
RUNESMITH2-ENHANCED.title: Enhanced
RUNESMITH2-POTENCY.description: Potency is the power of a Rune when it is [gold]Crafted[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-POTENCY.title: Potency
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE.description: Recipe cards can be played without the required {elements:rs2Icon(all)} to gain {elements:rs2Icon(all)} equals to the {elements:rs2Icon(all)} cost instead.
RUNESMITH2-RECIPE.title: Recipe
RUNESMITH2-STASIS.description: Prevent a card from losing [gold]Enhance[/gold] when played.
RUNESMITH2-STASIS.title: Stasis
RUNESMITH2-IMPROVED.description: Cards that are [gold]Upgraded[/gold], [gold]Enchanted[/gold], [gold]Enhanced[/gold], or [gold]Stasis[/gold] are considered to be Improved.
RUNESMITH2-IMPROVED.title: Improved
